fields.label: Workstation Type
fields.description: Select the type of workstation first (e.g. Ruling, Sheeting). The Workstation list will filter accordingly.

fields.label: Workstation
fields.description: Select the specific workstation. Only workstations matching the selected Workstation Type are shown. Job Capacity on the workstation controls the maximum reels allowed.

fields.label: Operator
fields.description: The employee operating this workstation during this entry.

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: Time the operator started on this workstation. For overnight shifts enter the actual clock time — duration is calculated automatically.

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: Time the operator finished on this workstation. If end time is earlier than start time an overnight shift is assumed.

fields.label: Duration (Hours)
fields.description: Auto-calculated from Start and End Time. Overnight shifts are handled correctly.

fields.label: Material Type
fields.description: NP = Newsprint  |  BP = Bond Paper  |  AP = Art Paper  |  CP = Coated Paper

fields.label: Output Type
fields.description: A1 = Grade A1 output  |  A2 = Grade A2 output  |  BT = Broke/Trim (waste/off-cuts)

fields.label: Number of Reels
fields.description: How many reels this workstation is running simultaneously in this entry. Cannot exceed the workstation's Job Capacity. Reel 2, 3 and 4 sections appear automatically when selected.

fields.label: GSM
fields.description: Grams per square metre — the grammage/weight of the paper on this reel.

fields.label: Reel Width (mm)
fields.description: The cut width of the reel in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of the reel at the beginning of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of the reel at the start of the run in kilograms.

fields.label: End Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of the reel at the end of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: End Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of the reel at the end of the run. Must be less than Start Weight.

fields.label: Cut Size
fields.description: The sheet size being cut, e.g. A4, F4, 210x297.

fields.label: Sheets per Ream
fields.description: Number of sheets that make up one full ream for this cut size (typically 480 or 500).

fields.label: Full Reams
fields.description: Total number of complete reams produced from this reel during this run.

fields.label: Balance Sheets
fields.description: Remaining sheets that did not make a full ream at the end of the run.

fields.label: Incomplete Reel (Carry Forward)
fields.description: Tick if paper remains on this reel and it will continue in the next shift or day. This reel will appear in the Incomplete Reels Tracker report.

fields.label: Reel 2
fields.description: Visible when Number of Reels is 2 or more.

fields.label: GSM
fields.description: Grams per square metre for Reel 2.

fields.label: Reel Width (mm)
fields.description: Cut width of Reel 2 in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of Reel 2 at the start of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of Reel 2 at the start of the run in kilograms.

fields.label: End Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of Reel 2 at the end of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: End Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of Reel 2 at the end of the run. Must be less than Start Weight.

fields.label: Cut Size
fields.description: Sheet size being cut from Reel 2, e.g. A4, F4, 210x297.

fields.label: Sheets per Ream
fields.description: Number of sheets per full ream for Reel 2 (typically 480 or 500).

fields.label: Full Reams
fields.description: Complete reams produced from Reel 2 during this run.

fields.label: Balance Sheets
fields.description: Remaining sheets from Reel 2 that did not make a full ream.

fields.label: Incomplete Reel (Carry Forward)
fields.description: Tick if Reel 2 has paper remaining and will carry forward to the next shift or day.

fields.label: Reel 3
fields.description: Visible when Number of Reels is 3 or more.

fields.label: GSM
fields.description: Grams per square metre for Reel 3.

fields.label: Reel Width (mm)
fields.description: Cut width of Reel 3 in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of Reel 3 at the start of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of Reel 3 at the start of the run in kilograms.

fields.label: End Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of Reel 3 at the end of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: End Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of Reel 3 at the end of the run. Must be less than Start Weight.

fields.label: Cut Size
fields.description: Sheet size being cut from Reel 3, e.g. A4, F4, 210x297.

fields.label: Sheets per Ream
fields.description: Number of sheets per full ream for Reel 3 (typically 480 or 500).

fields.label: Full Reams
fields.description: Complete reams produced from Reel 3 during this run.

fields.label: Balance Sheets
fields.description: Remaining sheets from Reel 3 that did not make a full ream.

fields.label: Incomplete Reel (Carry Forward)
fields.description: Tick if Reel 3 has paper remaining and will carry forward to the next shift or day.

fields.label: Reel 4
fields.description: Visible when Number of Reels is 4.

fields.label: GSM
fields.description: Grams per square metre for Reel 4.

fields.label: Reel Width (mm)
fields.description: Cut width of Reel 4 in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of Reel 4 at the start of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: Start Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of Reel 4 at the start of the run in kilograms.

fields.label: End Diameter (mm)
fields.description: Outer diameter of Reel 4 at the end of the run in millimetres.

fields.label: End Weight (kg)
fields.description: Gross weight of Reel 4 at the end of the run. Must be less than Start Weight.

fields.label: Cut Size
fields.description: Sheet size being cut from Reel 4, e.g. A4, F4, 210x297.

fields.label: Sheets per Ream
fields.description: Number of sheets per full ream for Reel 4 (typically 480 or 500).

fields.label: Full Reams
fields.description: Complete reams produced from Reel 4 during this run.

fields.label: Balance Sheets
fields.description: Remaining sheets from Reel 4 that did not make a full ream.

fields.label: Incomplete Reel (Carry Forward)
fields.description: Tick if Reel 4 has paper remaining and will carry forward to the next shift or day.

fields.label: Comments / Observations
fields.description: Any additional observations for this entry — e.g. machine downtime, quality issues, reel splices, or handover notes.
